commandModes.label: Scan repository
commandModes.description: Run a read-only repository structure scan through the backend runtime.

commandModes.label: Find file
commandModes.description: Create a coding-agent session for locating relevant files.

commandModes.label: Read file
commandModes.description: Create a coding-agent session for safe file-reading instructions.

commandModes.label: Explain architecture
commandModes.description: Ask the agent to explain owner chains and architecture.

commandModes.label: Debug issue
commandModes.description: Ask the agent to reproduce, isolate, and root-cause a defect.

commandModes.label: Fix code
commandModes.description: Ask the agent to prepare a safe implementation plan and patch proposal.

commandModes.label: Generate patch
commandModes.description: Request a reviewable patch artifact without applying it.

commandModes.label: Review patch
commandModes.description: Ask the agent to review proposed changes and risk.

commandModes.label: Prepare commit
commandModes.description: Generate commit summary and verification notes.

commandModes.label: Prepare pull request
commandModes.description: Prepare a locked commit and pull request workflow.

commandModes.label: Document change
commandModes.description: Ask the agent to update governed change records.
